residuals.risk: Synthetic or specified evidence is mistaken for physical performance.
residuals.disposition: Require an exact configuration and evidence pack for lab or field promotion.
residuals.stop_condition: Reject every physical claim lacking exact protocol, results, custody, environment and limitations.

residuals.risk: A conforming radio profile is mistaken for permission to transmit.
residuals.disposition: Keep regulatory mode and assumed-risk decision separate from conformance.
residuals.gate_or_task: transport decision plus local deployment review
residuals.stop_condition: No radiated TX without the chosen governed mode and local decision record.

residuals.risk: Invalid or rejected possible distress is silently deleted.
residuals.disposition: Preserve in bounded review quarantine without authenticating or promoting it.
residuals.gate_or_task: open-spec-exit community process and life-safety preservation
residuals.stop_condition: Silent discard or false authentication blocks conformance.

residuals.risk: Life-safety preservation becomes indefinite sensitive retention.
residuals.disposition: Add an implementation-specific incident-close SOP with reviewed disposition and receipt.
residuals.gate_or_task: future implementation profile and incident-close SOP
residuals.stop_condition: Implementation promotion requires bounded access, review and closure; destructive deletion during active distress is prohibited.

residuals.risk: Upstream firmware or protocol drift invalidates adapter evidence.
residuals.disposition: Pin exact versions and rerun vectors on every relevant change.
residuals.gate_or_task: adapter submission and matching addon gate
residuals.stop_condition: Demote or disable an adapter whose pin or vectors are stale.

residuals.risk: Evidence and alternatives evolve after publication.
residuals.disposition: Review rows on a versioned cadence and append evidence, negative results and decision changes.
residuals.stop_condition: No silent rewrite, removed alternative or unsupported global winner.

residuals.risk: Terminology and terminal guidance fail across languages, abilities or teams.
residuals.disposition: Accept localized and accessible profiles through the same review process.
residuals.gate_or_task: community extension process and optional P1a-03
residuals.stop_condition: No human-interoperability claim beyond the language and accessibility evidence supplied.

residuals.risk: A malicious contribution adds surveillance, offensive radio or prohibited inference.
residuals.disposition: Require closed schemas, privacy/security/safety review and negative tests.
residuals.stop_condition: Reject with record any offensive TX, biometric inference, continuous raw surveillance or absence-by-silence behavior.

residuals.risk: A contribution has incompatible or unclear licensing.
residuals.disposition: Require Apache-2.0 for normative submissions and preserve external references separately.
residuals.stop_condition: Do not merge material without compatible contribution authority.

residuals.risk: 50k correctness simulation is promoted to capacity or field-scale readiness.
residuals.disposition: Keep scale performance unverified until a versioned campaign supplies workload, topology, repetitions and full failures.
residuals.stop_condition: Reject capacity, latency or readiness claims derived only from deterministic correctness fixtures.

residuals.risk: A release cannot be reproduced or its normative inputs cannot be identified.
residuals.disposition: Publish versioned paths, offline gates, receipt inputs and checksums.
residuals.stop_condition: No normative publication without clean receipt and immutable version reference.

residuals.risk: A vendor, bearer or reference design captures the open specification.
residuals.disposition: Require capability alternatives, substitution and no universal winner or vendor certification program.
residuals.gate_or_task: matrix, reference builds and publication review
residuals.stop_condition: Reject any mandatory SKU, vendor-only path, paywall or global transport winner.
